Artifact Guide

Artifact Database

The full artifact database is on the main artifacts page. It includes the calculator, the classic pool, and the unique-source table in one place.

Open artifact database

Unique Artifact Sources

Unique artifacts come from the crate and from boss-linked evidence. The rows below keep the source details close to the artifact name.

SpriteArtifactStat familyValue rangeRarityUpgradeableDrop weightLevelsType odds

SpriteUnique artifactStat familyDamage / build focusBuff / debuffBossesAdditional notes
AdvectorianFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedUnknownAdvectorian
Artifact 100% x6 @ 100%
The downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Armorlock ProtocolStationary damage reduction: Adds damage reduction while stationary.
damageReductionWhileStationaryUnique		Stationary tankingMixedNo strict boss match in client dataAdds damage reduction while stationary. Best fit: Stationary tanking.
Bloodline SurgeOn-kill surge: Kills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
bloodlineSurge		On-kill snowballingBuffNo strict boss match in client dataKills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost. Best fit: On-kill snowballing.
Bullwark PrismUnique low shield reduction: Adds damage reduction when shields are low.
damageReductionWithLowShieldUnique		Low-shield survivalMixedNo strict boss match in client dataAdds damage reduction when shields are low. Best fit: Low-shield survival.
CleanerFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedUnknownThe Cleaner
Artifact 100% x6-10 @ 100%
The downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Crown of XhersixCleansing crown: Automatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
crownOfXhersix		Cleanse / defenseUtilityThree Emperors
Artifact 100% x10 @ 99%
Automatically cleanses debuffs on a timer. Best fit: Cleanse / defense.
DominatorFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheunconfirmedUnknownDominator
Artifact 100% x1-3 @ 100%
The downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.
Eternal AegisUnique damage reduction: Reduces incoming damage.
damageReductionUnique		Tank / survivalDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataReduces incoming damage. Best fit: Tank / survival.
Fist of ZharixKill shockwave: Kills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
fistOfZharix		On-kill AoE burstDebuffThree Emperors
Artifact 100% x10 @ 99%
Kills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies. Best fit: On-kill AoE burst.
Hyper Acid SplicerCorrosive ignite: Corrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
corrosiveChanceToIgnite		Corrosive hit buildsDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataCorrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage. Best fit: Corrosive hit builds.
Impact Emitter CoreSlow debuff: Hits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
slowDown		Control / slow buildsDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataHits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds. Best fit: Control / slow builds.
Legacy CoreLegacy ship upgrade: Legacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
upgrade		Legacy ship upgradeUtilityNo strict boss match in client dataLegacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships. Best fit: Legacy ship upgrade.
Lunacite CoreLucanite core: Weapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
lucaniteCore		Enemy damage reductionDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataWeapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds. Best fit: Enemy damage reduction.
Mantis CoreClose target damage core: Adds damage when the target is close.
mantisCore		Close-range brawlingBuffNo strict boss match in client dataAdds damage when the target is close. Best fit: Close-range brawling.
MotherbrainOvermind: Doubles pet count and increases pet health.
overmind		Pet buildsBuffMother Brain
Artifact 100% x6 @ 100%
Doubles pet count and increases pet health. Best fit: Pet builds.
Omega Shield DriverEnergy shield overload: Energy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
energyChanceToShieldOverload		Energy / Shield-burst hitsDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataEnergy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage. Best fit: Energy / Shield-burst hits.
Phase NullifierKinetic shield penetration: Kinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
kineticChanceToPenetrateShield		Kinetic / Shield-bypass hitsDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataKinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull. Best fit: Kinetic / Shield-bypass hits.
Plasma Disruptor RelicEnergy resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceEnergyResistance		Energy / Resistance shredDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataWeapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds. Best fit: Energy / Resistance shred.
Ring of YxthalKinetic resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceKineticResistance		Kinetic / Resistance shredDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataWeapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds. Best fit: Kinetic / Resistance shred.
Scourgebinder CoreCorrosive resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceCorrosiveResistance		Corrosive / Resistance shredDebuffNo strict boss match in client dataWeapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds. Best fit: Corrosive / Resistance shred.

Velocity CoreVelocity core: Large ship speed increase.

Virex InjectorUnique debuff damage: Increases damage dealt by debuffs.

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
